emails.body:
Dear Valued Member,

Costco Wholesale has exclusive savings waiting for you this week! From fresh produce to electronics, enjoy member-only pricing on thousands of items.

Highlights:
• Organic produce starting at $1.99/lb
• 65" 4K Smart TV — $200 off
• Kirkland Signature™ paper goods — buy 2, save $5
• Rotisserie chicken still just $4.99

Shop in-warehouse or online at Costco.com. Offers valid through October 7.

Thank you for your membership,
Costco Marketing Team

---
You're receiving this because you subscribed to Costco promotions. Unsubscribe: costco.example/unsub

Follow-up: Your savings don't stop there!

We noticed you didn't open our last note — here's a quick reminder of this week's top deals before they're gone:

✓ Gasoline: Member price at all Costco fuel stations
✓ Tires: Michelin & Bridgestone — $70 off set of 4 + free installation
✓ Pharmacy: Generic prescriptions from $4.99 (no insurance needed)
✓ Travel: Costco Travel packages up to 30% off hotels & rental cars

Log in at Costco.com to clip digital coupons instantly. No clipping required at checkout.

See you at the warehouse,
Costco Member Services

---
Manage preferences: costco.example/prefs
